name: Hippo Home Insurance API
what_it_does: Hippo proactive home insurance REST API for smart home-integrated homeowners insurance quoting, policy management, and claims processing. Enables AI agents to manage homeowners insurance quote generation and real-time rating for digital insurance binding automation, handle smart home device integration and risk reduction discount calculation for connected home underwriting automation, access policy issuance and endorsement for homeowners coverage change automation, retrieve claims intake and FNOI for digital claims reporting automation, manage property data enrichment and home inspection scheduling for underwriting data automation, handle renewal pricing and coverage recommendation for homeowners policy lifecycle automation, access loss prevention alert and smart home risk monitoring for proactive claims prevention automation, retrieve agent portal and referral program for insurance distribution automation, manage flood and umbrella cross-sell for homeowners coverage bundling automation, and integrate Hippo with real estate platforms, mortgage servicers, and smart home device manufacturers for embedded home insurance.
use_cases: Quoting homeowners insurance from digital binding agents
Integrating smart home devices from connected insurance agents
Filing home claims from digital FNOI automation agents
Cross-selling umbrella from homeowners bundling agents
not_for: Commercial property insurance and landlord policies
best_when: A real estate platform, mortgage servicer, home security company, or smart home manufacturer wanting AI agents to automate homeowners insurance quoting, smart home risk integration, policy management, and claims intake via Hippo's proactive home insurance API.
avoid_when: STATE AVAILABILITY AND ADMITTED CARRIER FILING: Hippo homeowners insurance is not available in all US states; automated quote generation must check state availability before initiating quote workflow; automated binding in non-admitted states creates insurance regulatory violation. PROPERTY DATA ACCURACY FOR UNDERWRITING BINDING: Automated homeowners quote and binding via Hippo using property data APIs (Zillow, county assessor) must verify data accuracy for replacement cost and coverage adequacy; automated binding with incorrect square footage or construction type creates coverage gap for homeowner. CLAIMS FRAUD DETECTION FOR FIRST NOTICE AUTOMATION: Automated FNOI submission via Hippo for property claims must include complete loss circumstance; automated FNOI with incomplete or inconsistent loss description creates fraud indicator flag requiring investigation delay; implement completeness check before automated FNOI submission.

auth.notes: Hippo uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Palo Alto, California HQ. Founded 2015 by Assaf Wand and Eyal Navon. Public (NYSE: HIPO via SPAC 2021). Proactive home insurance with smart home integration. Coverage in 40+ US states. Smart home device program with free device package for policyholders. Spinnaker Insurance Company carrier subsidiary. Real estate and mortgage embedded insurance partnerships. Competes with Lemonade, Branch, and traditional carriers for home insurance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — carrier API partnership for embedded insurance programs
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue share or referral fee model for embedded insurance partners; direct consumer pricing via Hippo platform; partner API access via business development
pricing.notes: Palo Alto CA. NYSE: HIPO. Founded 2015. Public insurtech. Revenue share model for embedded insurance partners. Direct consumer homeowners pricing. 40+ state coverage.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; quote and policy queries throttled; webhooks for policy and claims events

known_agent_gotchas: STATE AVAILABILITY CHECK BEFORE QUOTE WORKFLOW: Hippo homeowners insurance is not available in all 50 states; automated quote initiation must check Hippo state availability list before starting quote workflow; automated quote attempts in unavailable states create quote failure and poor customer experience

PUBLIC COMPANY SPAC FINANCIAL STABILITY CONTEXT: Hippo went public via SPAC in 2021 and has faced financial challenges as a public insurtech; validate Hippo's current financial stability and insurance operations before building deep embedded insurance workflows; insurtech carrier insolvency creates policy continuity risk for embedded insurance partners

PROPERTY DATA MISMATCH FOR REPLACEMENT COST ACCURACY: Automated quote generation using third-party property data (Zillow, county assessor) for replacement cost may have data accuracy issues (incorrect square footage, construction type, year built); automated binding with inaccurate replacement cost creates homeowner coverage gap at claim time; implement data validation review for high-value properties

SMART HOME DEVICE PROGRAM ELIGIBILITY VERIFICATION: Hippo's smart home device program provides free device package for qualifying policies; automated smart home integration workflow must verify device program eligibility based on policy type, state, and property characteristics; automated device provisioning without eligibility check creates device fulfillment errors

FNOI COMPLETENESS FOR FRAUD PREVENTION PASS: Automated FNOI submission for property claims must include complete loss circumstance data (date, cause, location, description); incomplete automated FNOI triggers fraud investigation hold and claims delay; automated FNOI must collect all required fields before submission

MORTGAGE SERVICER INTEGRATION FOR LOSS PAYEE ENDORSEMENT: Automated homeowners policy management for mortgaged properties must maintain mortgage servicer loss payee endorsement; automated policy endorsement or cancellation without loss payee notification creates mortgage servicer breach of escrow insurance requirement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Home insurtech. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Homeowner PII, property data, and claims information.

security_score_components.security_notes: Home insurance. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Homeowner PII, property, and claims data.
